name: @appstrate/note
description: Append a long-term archive memory. Reachable from the agent only via recall_memory. Per-actor by default — well-suited for personal observations; pass scope="shared" for facts universal to the app.

tool.name: note
tool.description: Append a long-term archive memory — a discovery, fact, or user preference worth keeping across future runs. Archive memories are NOT injected into the system prompt; retrieve them on demand with recall_memory. Scope defaults to "actor" — well-suited for personal preferences and per-user observations (scheduled runs, manual triggers, and different members each see only their own notes). Pass scope="shared" when the fact is universal to the app (an API quirk, an org-wide convention, a shared resource's structure) so every actor's run can recall it.

scope.description: Persistence scope. "actor" (default) keeps the note private to the calling actor — well-suited for personal preferences. "shared" makes the note visible to every actor of the app; use this for facts that are universal regardless of who triggered the run.
